title: AN ACT MOVING THE DATE OF " CATARMAN DAY" TO AUGUST 30 OF EVEEY YEAR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9203, ENTITLED "AN ACT DECLARING THE FIFTEENTH (15 TH) DAY OF AUGUST OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN, PROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN, TO BE KNOWN AS 'CATARMAN DAT "

chunks.text:
115 OG NO. 8, 1825 (February 25, 2019); Manila Bulletin, February 11, 2019

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11182, January 03, 2019 ]

AN ACT MOVING THE DATE OF " CATARMAN DAY" TO AUGUST 30 OF EVEEY YEAR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9203, ENTITLED "AN ACT DECLARING THE FIFTEENTH (15 TH) DAY OF AUGUST OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN, PROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN, TO BE KNOWN AS 'CATARMAN DAT "

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section 1 of Republic Act No. 9203 is hereby amended to read as follows:

"SECTION 1. August 30 of every year is hereby declared a Special nonworking holiday in the Municipality of Catarman, Province of Camiguin, to commemorate its foundation day anniversary, to be known as 'Catarman Day'."

SEC. 2. The Municipal Government of Catarman in the Province of Camiguin shall disseminate to its component barangays, as well as to the Provincial Government of Camiguin, through means it deems proper and expedient, the change of the date of Catarman Day, for proper coordination of activities.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 2,2017 and October 10,2018, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: JAN 03 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
